zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Phillips II MP於1500年10月21日出生時，他的父親Sir Richard Walter Phillips21歲，母親Lady Emeline Spynge19歲。他於1541年2月4日與Johane Smith在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1589年11月15日享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Phillips II MP于1500年10月21日出生时，他的父亲Sir Richard Walter Phillips21岁，母亲Lady Emeline Spynge19岁。他于1541年2月4日与Johane Smith在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1589年11月15日享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Phillips
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, North German, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name   Philip  . In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages (see   Philips  ).

variants.name: Phillipps
meanings: English, Scottish and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Philipps
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Philip
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Varughese, Mathai, Babu, Reji, Anil, Binu, Neena, Prema, Raju, Reena, Susheela, Aleykutty.

Scottish, English, German, Dutch, and Jewish: from the Greek personal name Philippos (from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’). In the New Testament this name is borne by one of the apostles; it was also borne by various other early Christian saints. It owes part of its popularity to the medieval romances about Alexander the Great, whose father was Philip of Macedon. As a Jewish name, it represents a borrowing of the personal name from Christians. As a Highland Scottish surname, it represents an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Spanish Felipe , Catalan Felip, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian Filip , Albanian Filipi , and their derivatives (see examples at Philips ). The name Philip is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Philipose and Pothen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Phillip .
French (southern) and Breton (Finistère): variant of   Philippe  .

variants.name: Phelps
meanings: Scottish and English (southwestern): variant of   Phillips  .

History: The brothers George and William Phelps emigrated from Gloucestershire, England, to Dorchester, MA, c. 1630. Five years later they moved to Windsor, CT. George's sixth-generation descendant, Anson Greene Phelps (1781–1853), rose from being a penniless orphan to the status of a major industrialist and a prominent CT philanthropist.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Phillips II MP was born on 21 October 1500, his father, Sir Richard Walter Phillips, was 21 and his mother, Lady Emeline Spynge, was 19. He married Johane Smith on 4 February 1541, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 15 November 1589, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Phillips II MP est né le 21 octobre 1500, son père, Sir Richard Walter Phillips, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Emeline Spynge, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Johane Smith le 4 février 1541, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1589, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Phillips II MP am 21. Oktober 1500 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Walter Phillips 21 und seine Mutter Lady Emeline Spynge 19. Er hat am 4. Februar 1541 in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom Johane Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 15. November 1589 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Phillips II MP è nato il il 21 ottobre 1500, il suo padre, Sir Richard Walter Phillips, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Emeline Spynge, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Johane Smith il 4 febbraio 1541, nel Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 15 novembre 1589, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Phillips II MPが1500年10月21日に生まれた時，父Sir Richard Walter Phillipsは21歳，母Lady Emeline Spyngeは19歳であった。1541年2月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターでJohane Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1589年11月15日に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Phillips II MP(이)가 1500년 10월 21일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Walter Phillips(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Emeline Spynge(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1541년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 Johane Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1589년 11월 15일 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.21 October 1500–15 November 1589: 21 de outubro de 1500–15 de novembro de 1589
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Phillips II MP nasceu em 21 de outubro de 1500, seu pai, Sir Richard Walter Phillips, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Emeline Spynge, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Johane Smith em 4 de fevereiro de 1541, em Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1589, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Phillips II MP родился 21 октября 1500 г., его отцу по имени Sir Richard Walter Phillips было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Emeline Spynge, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Johane Smith 4 февраля 1541 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 15 ноября 1589 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

Se casó con Johane Smith el 4 de febrero de 1541, en Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1589, a la edad de 89 años.
